title: DuHouse 8.7" Silk Hydrangea Flower Heads with Stems Fake Hydrangeas Flowers for DIY Wedding Centerpiece Home Decor,Pack of 6(Lilac)
availability_text: Only 2 left in stock (more on the way).
features: [Material]:Hydrangea Flowers are made of high quality silk.The stems are made of plastic, which contains iron wire.Each pack contains 6 hydrangeas, all of which have long stems.
[Size]:Hydrangea Heads diameter:8.7";Height:5.5";Stem length:10.23". Each hydrangea head has 90 petals and the flower head is in bloom!

[Suitable for multiple scenarios]:Lovely hydrangeas are perfect for wedding centerpieces.How gorgeous it will be to make a beautiful bouquet of these blooming flowers for the bride!It is also suitable for homes, gardens, churches, offices, galleries, hotels, cafes, parties and other occasions.
[DIY]: You can bend or trim the stems according to the size of the vase. And DIY Silk hydrangeas to match with other artificial flowers is also a good choice.
[Service]:Our hydrangea bouquets are handmade by skilled craftsmen.We provide a 30-day unconditional return service.
description: Product Description Hydrangea Silk Flowers Arrangement Idea Home Decor Hydrangea Ball Centerpiece Decor Hydrangea Wreath Wall Decor Reception Decor After-Sales and Maintenance Use hair dryer with hot air to dry them if squeezed. Keep them in the sun for a while. If it gets dirty, wipe it gently with a damp towel. Keep them away from fire.
